Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 
412 
REINSURANCE_DEMO_TYPE 
LABEL: 
Part D Reinsurance Demonstration Type 
DESCRIPTION: This variable describes the type of Part D payment reinsurance demonstration, for applicable plan 
benefit packages. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: REINSURANCE_DEMO_TYPE 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS Files) 
VALUES: 
0 = Non-Payment Demonstration 

1 = Flexible capitated option 

2 =
